name: Children's Online Privacy Protection Act
description: US federal law (Pub. L. 105-277, Title XIII, codified at 15 USC §§ 6501-6506) regulating online services directed to children under 13, or that knowingly collect information from children under 13. Implementing regulations are at 16 CFR Part 312 (COPPA Rule).
relationToCloudSecurity: Applies to cloud-hosted online services within COPPA's scope.
relationToAISecurity: Applies to AI systems that collect personal information from children under 13.

license.notes: Work of the US government is in the public domain in the United States per 17 USC § 105.

lifecycle.notes: Enacted as Title XIII of the Omnibus Consolidated and Emergency Supplemental Appropriations Act, 1999. FTC final rule effective 2000-04-21; major amendment to FTC Rule 2013.

current_extraction.notes: Source PDF from govinfo.gov USCODE-2023-title15 chap 91, marker-extracted to markdown. Parsed via the shared extract_us_plaw.py PLAW parser into 8 per-section CSV/JSON entries (§§ 6501-6506 plus 6507/6508).
